<?php require __DIR__ . '/../vendor/autoload.php'; use GeoIp2\Database\Reader; use GeoIp2\Exception\AddressNotFoundException; srand(0); $reader = new Reader('GeoIP2-City.mmdb'); $count = 500000; $startTime = microtime(true); for ($i = 0; $i < $count; ++$i) { $ip = long2ip(rand(0, 2 ** 32 - 1)); try { $t = $reader->city($ip); } catch (AddressNotFoundException $e) { } if ($i % 10000 === 0) { echo $i . ' ' . $ip . "\n"; } } $endTime = microtime(true); $duration = $endTime - $startTime; echo 'Requests per second: ' . $count / $duration . "\n";
